description: For the the strategy I use in the company, Tipalti has been the best investment without a doubt. It streamlined all the processes from the first moment, and it has become an essential tool for the company and my work team. The overall experience is magnificent.
author: Louise S.
pros: I like it because it allows me to easily use the functions, which by the way are extraordinary and this saves me a lot of time. There are other programs that although they are a little more economical, they are a lot of work when you start using them. Therefore, the best thing is undoubtedly the ease with which you can start using it in the company.
cons: The weakest point is the support, but it is something that can be solved. On more than one occasion I had problems communicating with the support team and they were not pleasant experiences.

review_title: Smooth AP Automation with Top-Notch Netsuite Integration
description: Tipalti has significantly streamlined our Accounts Payable. It automates invoice processing, eliminating manual spreadsheets, reducing errors, and ensuring compliance. The Netsuite integration provides real-time accuracy. This has improved our efficiency and scalability, allowing the finance team to focus on strategic work.
author: Diether M.
pros: Tipalti successfully centralized and automated our AP processes. The Netsuite integration is excellent, with real-time syncing and accurate GL impacts. Automated approval workflows and OCR scanning are game-changers, saving significant time and simplifying multi-entity accounts. Customer support has been fantastic ([sensitive content hidden] , specifically), and the system is clearly built to scale for our future growth.
cons: Setting up custom approval workflows and vendor onboarding required a steep initial learning curve, which required a lot of back-and-forth. However, the system's flexibility and support team helped us manage these issues effectively.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: Has potential but disappointing so far
description: It's been a disappointing experience so far, however I hope our feedback is taken seriously and the product rapidly improves before our contract is up for renewal
author: Mathew K.
pros: It is user friendly from a purchase requisitioner perspective
cons: Where do I start? - Laggy - flicking between procurement and bills is too slow - not a robust platform - No notification to purchase order requisitioner/approvers that invoice has been received and can be receipted - No OCR technology to read if no PO number on invoice and send back notification to supplier if PO number is missing - SLA on payments of invoices it too long - payments need to be released quicker - Doesn't integrate with Sage as well as expected - Doesn't update bank details of suppliers on Sage - No remittance to suppliers - Updated version of bills never loads invoice image - No audit trail of approvals on payment run, have to open procurement (time consuming as above) to ensure correct approval workflow

review_title: Tipalti - Learning Curve but Worth It
description: It has been generally positive in regards to accomplishing the goal of automating manual billing/collections and payment workflows and speeding up the invoice process especially. I'm not sure I would say it's the number one tool out there, but it is a workable solution.
author: Erin B.
pros: I like that it has a multitude of integration opportunities with other software and platforms. I also like the ability to handle international payments, using ACH or other methods. The other benefit is the approval workflow system that makes it simple but also efficient for easy approvals up the chain.
cons: It is a little bit difficult to get up and running in regards to the user interface and getting comfortable with all the settings, capabilities, site itself, etc.

description: Great company, and great people to work with. They have been beneficial to my organization, our vendors, and the individuals on my team.
author: Ho Y.
pros: Tipalti helps our vendors manage their own payment details. That cuts down on my fraud risk and also frees up my team to focus on other more value-adding parts of their roles. Tipalti is also great with international payments.
cons: Since we have started working with Tipalti, they have continued to innovate and bring other related products to market, such as Tipalti Card. We have not been able to utilize any of these yet.

review_title: Improve and facilitate your payment system
description: So far, in the time we have been using the tool, we have encountered few situations, and in those cases the service has been very efficient. The information that is handled in the form of reports or summaries for the year, for example, has made our work of closing the period much easier.
author: Mariano R.
pros: Tipalti simplifies your payment system, clearing the information of your clients and partners and giving you the ease of executing a large number of payments in a short time.
cons: The payment situation in some foreign currencies is sometimes difficult and varies in the charges and payment times, although we understand that this is something that is currently being worked on.

description: Tipalti has been a pleasure to work with. They are fast on a reply and solution.
author: Kelley W.
pros: Tipalti has in instrumental in so many aspects of our accounting improvements. We have implemented bill approvals with keeps us compliant as well as everyone accountable for their budget. We have been able to streamline and shorten our monthly closing process thanks to Tipalti. Lastly, Tipalti cards has allowed us to enable employees the ease of a company card with fast tracking and reconciliation.
cons: I would love for a few tweaks on the platform interface but aside from that, no major cons.

description: Implementation was awesome, go-live was simple, and the support team has been super responsive! What more could you ask for?
author: Shadia C.
pros: After some disastrous implementations, Tipalti's white glove service was a breath of fresh air. Our implementation lead, [sensitive content hidden], walked us through each step and always made sure all of our questions were answered. This was by far the easiest implementation we've made. It made it completely worth every penny.
cons: The UI is just a tad on the older side. I know they've got a lot on their roadmap but the automation pieces of it are still a little clunky.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

description: Overall, it’s been satisfactory but there are major areas of improvement that take Tipalti to a new level.
author: Britaney C.
pros: I love the ease of using Tipalti and the ability to give vendors control over their accounts.
cons: Tipalti doesn’t seem to have been created with accountants in mind. Much of the report is lacking and much of UI leaves much to be desired.

description: Great! I really like that I can monitor all of our invoices in one hub under each specific tab. The flow of Tipalti is great and it has really helped us with processing AP items.
author: Jennifer S.
pros: The scanning of invoices to create less manual entry
cons: Nothing. It took minimal time to learn the ins and outs of this system. I am still learning new things and the updates are great.

review_title: Titalti Helped us expanding our business worldwide
description: We used to pay our costomers via bank or paypal, and that limited us from expanding, since we started paying via tipalti our payment system is very easy for international users of our platform, I would say they were the game changers for us in international market capturing
author: Vikash M.
pros: The number of payment Methods Available in tipalti is a lot, We are able to serve customers worldwide after our co-operation with tipalti
cons: Offcourse their Charges are way high compared to normal companies but yes worth it.

review_title: Streamline Your Global Payments with Tipalti
description: As a mid-sized business with a global supplier base, we found that Tipalti has been instrumental in streamlining our payment processes. The platform's automation features have significantly reduced manual work and errors, and the comprehensive dashboard has enabled us to track payments and generate detailed reports. While there was a learning curve during the setup process, Tipalti's customer support team was responsive and helpful, making the overall experience positive.
author: Maciej G.
pros: Tipalti is an all-in-one global payments solution that simplifies the process of paying suppliers and vendors across the world. Its automated system reduces manual work and errors, allowing businesses to easily manage tax compliance, payment regulations, and currency conversions. Additionally, Tipalti provides a comprehensive dashboard that enables users to track payments, review transaction details, and generate reports, making it easy to stay on top of finances.
cons: While Tipalti offers a robust set of features, it can be complex and overwhelming to set up and navigate. Users may require significant training and support to utilize all of the platform's capabilities, and the setup process can be time-consuming. Additionally, the pricing structure of Tipalti may be prohibitively expensive for smaller businesses with lower transaction volumes.

description: Tipalti's implementation and support teams have been great throughout. We have realized cost savings in both personnel costs and foreign transaction fees. Tipalti has put our finance department one step closer to our goal of operational excellence.
author: Jill D.
pros: We love the user friendly interface and the ease of navigating around the system. Tipalti makes it easy to quickly view status of payments and invoices. Having one payment run for international and domestic payments reduces time and costs. It is fantastic having a completely paperless payable process!
cons: The OCR feature is just Ok. There is still a thorough invoice review by our internal accounting team. I have noticed over time that it is getting smarter. During implementation, registering vendors on the software was more work than anticipated, but we appreciate the fact that electronic validation of W-9s helps minimize work for our staff now.

description: Tipalti is solving the problem of being an effective platform that we use to pay our domestic and foreign video owners. It is our housing system that we rely on to store the data that we need for our accounting records on a monthly basis during our month-end close and on an annual basis for tax reporting purposes.
author: Abhi B.
pros: he system is easy to navigate and I am able to download the reports that I need. Annually, when we send 1099s to our domestic video owner licensees and 1042s to our international video owner licensees I am able to effectively gather the data that we need to send to licensees and to report to the IRS for tax purposes.
cons: I wouldn't say that there is anything that I specifically dislike about Tipalti. Maybe just improved turnaround times from customer support to close out open tickets that we've submitted.

description: I used Tipalti a lot as an affiliate and I am particularly please with on time payments and w8 form provided by the platform for task compliance
author: Babatunde O.
pros: Provides easier way to fill tax form and receive affiliate payments from a wide range of partners
cons: Tipalti needs to integrate with platforms like stripe so that other developers can use it for affiliate payments

description: Tipalti has made it easy for us to track our daily financial expenses in real-time. The software has enhanced budgeting and forecasting.
author: Marco M.
pros: Tipalti accounting software comes with freedom to work across all devices and provides complete financial solutions for all sizes of businesses.
cons: AP automation features are sluggish and very unreliable.

description: Great experience. I never had an issue with it so far.
author: Jonathan S.
pros: Tipalti allows me to receive my payments once they are sent by the payer really quickly. It has affordable fees compared to other platforms.
cons: Sometimes the transactions are processed immediately, and some other times it takes a couple of business days even if it is a recurring payment from the same sender and receiver.

review_title: Tipalti - A Made Easy payment gateway
description: I was particularly concerned about whether the rules governing money transfers applied to our international payments. Tipalti introduced a fantastic money transfer solution that is extremely effective and accommodates a range of payment methods. By integrating Tipalti into our payment procedure, we have sent millions of dollars overseas. Tipalti has greatly reduced the amount of time I spend processing invoice payments.
author: Verified Reviewer
pros: With Tipalti, it's simple to view the status of payments and invoices right away. Time and money are saved by having a single payment run for both domestic and international payments. Having a 100% paperless payables procedure is wonderful. The software handles processing invoices and paying vendors with relative ease when used independently.
cons: One of my issues is that it is impossible to alert the authorizer that an approval claim has been made but been refused. If invoices could be included in a pending payment order, customers could readily track the status. The cost is not cheap. The implementation process takes some time. But once you board, the journey is incredible.

description: Overall Tipalti is great software and help us with our AP processl.
author: Vilim P.
pros: We use Tipalti for AP and it is working great as they provide great approval work flow and payment process.
cons: One of the issues is reporting as Tipalti provide only hand full of standard reports.

review_title: Excellence and Efficiency: A Comprehensive Review of Tipalti Accounting System
description: Using Tipalti for global payments management has been an overall positive experience for our organization. Tipalti's intuitive and user-friendly platform makes it easy for us to manage large amounts of financial data and global payments.
author: Ajit K.
pros: Tipalti is a comprehensive software solution for automating accounts payable operations. It offers a variety of features that make it stand out from its competitors, including robust automation capabilities, streamlined payment processes, and comprehensive reporting tools.
cons: I found that Tipalti's software could be difficult to navigate and manage, particularly for large batches of payments. The user interface was quite complex, and it could be hard to find the information you needed without an in-depth understanding of the product.

author: Roger C.
pros: Helps keep me aware of pending approvals and has all of the relevant data points displayed so that I don't have to go back to our CRM to confirm.
cons: Nothing really comes to mind as the system has always been reliable i.e. have never experienced downtime or had any connectivity issues.

description: We've used Tipalti since their early days and have been very happy with the services and features. I was looking for a way to pay our research contractors who live worldwide. We've paid people in more than 100 countries and with that needed to improve the efficiency of the process. We also had a concern that our worldwide payments are in compliance with money transfer regulations. Tipalti brought a terrific money transfer solution that's very efficient and supports a variety of payment options. We implemented Tipalti into our payment process and have since transferred millions of dollars worldwide.
author: Eric B.
pros: Our researchers love the lower fees compared to just PayPal payments and the variety of money transfer choices. It's dependable and our researchers get paid in a dependable manner. The ability to capture payment details and tax forms without the headache of PCI compliance has been a big help for us.
cons: Sometimes it would be nice if more of the configuration options were available in the actual application. There are some choices and options that are not easily known unless you go back and forth with support.

review_title: The perfect solution for my business
description: One of the standout features is its ability to automate the entire payment workflow, from affiliate onboarding to coin selection to sending payments. This automation has dramatically reduced the amount of time and effort you previously spent manually managing payments.
author: Juan B.
pros: What I liked the most is its ability to completely simplify my affiliate payments. Before using this platform, I had to deal with a manual and tedious process that consumed a lot of time and resources. But now, I can automate the entire process, from affiliate onboarding to currency selection to sending payments.
cons: One of the things that I liked the least is its initial learning curve. At first, it can be a bit overwhelming to get familiar with all the features and functionality of the platform.
author_duration: Used the software for: I used a free trial

description: Our AP controller left and we did not replace her. Tipalti automates half of what she was doing (setting up new suppliers, processing supplier invoices, setting up payment runs and actually paying suppliers) at a lower cost and the control environment is strengthened too.
author: Patrick O.
pros: The product is pretty easy to use, the supplier management puts the emphasis on the suppliers to get details correct, and because they want to be paid they are motivated to do so. In addition, the control environment is strengthened with the screening of suppliers and the internal digital invoice approval process of invoices means budget accountability is strengthened. It also integrates very well with NetSuite, which is important as that is my book of record.
cons: The dashboard is not the best, it looks a bit out of date and could do with being refreshed. I would also like to see the product handle staff expenses and staff credit cards.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: A user-friendly software for managing payments
description: Our business uses Tipalti to manage the payments of thousands of users located all around the world. They all use different currencies and have different tax requirements, but with the help of this software, this is extremely easy to oversee.
author: Reka O.
pros: I am a user of Tipalti who is not particularly well versed in finances, but the platform is so easy to understand that even I can use it with confidence. I also received excellent customer service from Tipalti numerous times.
cons: I cannot say that there is anything I dislike about the software. I haven't had any major negative experiences so far.
